label: Jewellery (SCAFFOLD — thin sources, uncalibrated; provisional/flagged only until Tier-1 + calibration land)

captureSlots.label: Signature / hallmark macro
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of the maker's signature and any numbering.

captureSlots.label: Full piece
captureSlots.guidance: Whole piece, square-on, even light, scale reference.

captureSlots.label: Metal purity marks
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of purity / assay stamps (750, 18K, PT950).

captureSlots.label: Principal gemstone
captureSlots.guidance: Close detail of the principal stone(s) — cut, setting, any inclusions visible.

captureSlots.label: Clasp / fittings
captureSlots.guidance: Clasp, findings and any signed fittings.

captureSlots.label: Gem lab certificate / papers
captureSlots.guidance: GIA / SSEF / Gübelin report, receipt, or box and papers.

redFlags.label: Replaced stones
redFlags.description: Original gems swapped for lesser or synthetic replacements.

redFlags.label: Added / altered signature
redFlags.description: A spurious or re-struck maker's signature on an unsigned or altered piece.

redFlags.label: Converted piece
redFlags.description: Reworked from a larger or different original (a brooch from a tiara element).

redFlags.label: Synthetic presented as natural
redFlags.description: Lab-grown or treated stones presented as natural and untreated.

redFlags.label: Plated presented as solid
redFlags.description: Gold- or rhodium-plated base metal presented as solid precious metal.

corpusSources.name: Maker archives (Cartier, Van Cleef & Arpels, Tiffany, Bulgari)
